review_gates.trigger: product_expansion_gaps is non-empty or a missing element would require new product capability
interaction closure, async behavior, failure recovery, or user-facing copy is disputed
presentation pattern, shared component decision, carrier adaptation, containment, horizontal scroll exception, or z-axis layering is disputed
FINAL_DRD.md, final manifest, hash index, reference index, and conservation report are ready

review_binding_rule: Every approval must bind the reviewed subject hash, approved sections, reviewer, decision, and open blockers. Chat-only approval is not sufficient unless recorded in a REVIEW_DECISION.json artifact.
